<!--
Veda PR template. Fill every section. Delete the HTML comments before submitting.
If a section genuinely doesn't apply, write "N/A — [reason]" rather than leaving blank.
-->

## What is this PR?

<!-- One sentence. What changes and for whom? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check one. -->

- [ ] Fix (typo, broken link, small correction)
- [ ] Framework edit (changes decision logic inside `frameworks/<investor>.md`)
- [ ] New framework (adds a new file under `frameworks/`)
- [ ] Worked example (adds or edits a file under `examples/`)
- [ ] Docs (README, CONTRIBUTING, setup, onboarding)
- [ ] Other: ____

## Why

<!-- Why is this change needed? What was wrong or missing before?
     For framework edits: what question was Veda answering incorrectly? -->

## Source citation (required for framework edits and new frameworks)

<!-- Book + page, essay + year, interview + date, or letter + year.
     "Peter Lynch, One Up on Wall Street, ch. 8" — yes.
     "Common investing wisdom" — no.
     Delete this section only if the change is a pure typo fix or docs edit. -->

## Worked example (required if the change affects decision logic)

<!-- Show a concrete question where the old text gave a wrong answer and the new text
     gives a right answer. Use the shape of examples/01-hold-check-winner.md — doesn't
     need to be that long, but it must include: the question, what the old logic said,
     what the new logic says, and why the new answer is better.
     Delete this section only if the change is a pure typo fix or docs edit. -->

## Self-check

- [ ] Voice: direct, opinionated, no hedging language, no emojis, no motivational phrasing.
- [ ] Scope: change is contained — one investor file, one example, one docs section. (Large sweeping edits will usually be asked to split.)
- [ ] No `profile.md`, `journal.md`, or personal data in the diff.
- [ ] Internal links still resolve (I clicked them).
- [ ] If I changed a framework or the router, I updated the relevant worked example (or added a new one).
- [ ] If I added a new framework, I also updated `routing/framework-router.md` and `CREDITS.md`.

## Anything reviewers should know?

<!-- Open questions, tradeoffs you considered, things you deliberately did NOT do. -->
